title: Section 73
content: 73. Penalty for publishing 1[electronic signature] Certificate false in certain particulars.--(1) No person shall publish a 1[electronic signature] Certificate or otherwise make it available to any other person with the knowledge that-- (a) the Certifying Authority listed in the certificate has not issued it; or (b) the subscriber listed in the certificate has not accepted it; or (c) the certificate has been revoked or suspended, unless such publication is for the purpose of verifying a 1[electronic signature] created prior to such suspension or revocation. (2) Any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-section (1) shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine which may extend to one lakh rupees, or with both.
footnote: 1.Subs. by Act 10 of 2009, s. 38, for section 77 (w.e.f. 27-10-2009).
